calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-03-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Jana Lynn VanHuizen was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Jan Huisken.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-01-2010 Reset To Aug-03-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Judge: Monica F. Wiley, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Katy Bersamin, #11722.

Petitioner Jana Lynn VanHuizen was present in pro per, placed under oath but did not testify.
Proof of Publication was filed today, July 1, 2010.

The Court requires further information from petitioner in order to proceed with today's proposed name change. Good cause appearing, this matter is CONTINUED to August 3, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-22-2010 Reset To Jul-01-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
